docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, STEPHEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-20-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE
CHALLENGES TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE AS TO PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, STEPHEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE $5,084.71 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,084.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE
THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-19-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED.(JR/506)
